candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Higher-gain non-adopted reference: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the full live successor value.
Current best narrow safe reference: penultimate successor value blended 25% live / 75% cached.
Keep the live predecessor carry state z_on_k and replace only the successor increment with its cached analogue.
Replace only the predecessor carry state with the cached analogue while keeping the successor increment live/on-policy.

successor_value_component_table.where_produced: batch rollout loop carry state before calling _plan_tf2_micro_step
successor_value_component_table.used_for: predecessor carry state in z_on_next = z_on_k + Δ_on

successor_value_component_table.where_produced: _plan_tf2_micro_step: z_on_k + dt * on_velocity, optionally stabilized by the existing full-vector angle clip
successor_value_component_table.used_for: preterminal successor value handed to the next micro-step

successor_value_component_table.where_produced: derived inside this suite as z_on_next_live - z_on_k_live
successor_value_component_table.used_for: successor increment component of the live preterminal successor-value formulation

successor_value_component_table.where_produced: derived inside this suite as z_on_next_cached - z_on_k_cached
